context.tests_note: 28/38 suites pass (399/453 tests). 10 failing suites all share sqlite3 native binding load error on Windows — pre-existing environment issue, not caused by worker changes.

findings.worker_claim: Created css/design-system.css as unified CSS entry point and applied to 5 key pages, converting crypto-checkout from hardcoded colors to CSS variables
findings.evidence: design-system.css exists with @import wrapper (79 lines). All 5 HTML pages confirmed with <link> tag. crypto-checkout.html verified: hardcoded colors (#FFFFFF, #111827, etc.) replaced with CSS vars (--color-surface, --color-text, --space-8, etc.). Commit b528d77 stats match claim exactly (6 files changed).

findings.worker_claim: Full subscription system: schema, Stripe checkout, webhooks, content gating, admin MRR/subscriber endpoints, Customer Portal, account/memberships.html
findings.evidence: subscriptionRoutes.js has all 11 claimed routes with real implementations (not stubs). Schema has membership_tiers + subscriptions tables with proper indexes and FK. requiresSubscription() middleware exported. Frontend page has real fetch/render logic with Stripe portal integration. Auto Stripe Price creation on tier setup confirmed. Webhook handles 4 event types with idempotent upsert. 46 instances of proper error handling found.

findings.worker_claim: Created /api/agent/* machine-payable endpoints with NIP-98/API key auth and /.well-known/agent-capabilities.json
findings.evidence: agentRoutes.js: 680 lines with catalog, quote (TTL cache), purchase (Lightning+Stripe), order status. Auth middleware for NIP-98 and X-Api-Key (lines 76-120). Rate limiters configured. wellKnownRoutes.js: 177 lines with full OpenAPI manifest. Both wired in server.js.

findings.worker_claim: Extracted shared databaseHelper.js, removed copy-pasted db wrappers
findings.evidence: databaseHelper.js exists (24 lines), exports dbRun/dbGet/dbAll as promisified wrappers. Used by courseRoutes.js and 4+ other route files.

findings.worker_claim: Added success: false to all error responses in adminRoutes
findings.evidence: adminRoutes.js (1122 lines) has 46 instances of success: false in error responses. Consistent format: res.status(XXX).json({ success: false, error: 'message' }).

test_failures.root_cause: sqlite3 native binding fails to load in Windows test environment (TypeError: exists is not a function at bindings.getRoot). All 10 failing suites share this same root cause. Not caused by any worker changes.

context.summary: 5/5 tasks verified. Both workers delivered genuine, complete implementations — no stubs, TODOs, or fakes found. Design system properly wraps existing CSS with @import. Subscription system has full Stripe integration with 11 routes, schema, middleware, and frontend. Spot-checked 3 additional tasks from prior sessions — all verified. 10 test suite failures are pre-existing sqlite3 Windows binding issues, unrelated to worker changes.
